objective: Advance the pure SW industry index research system to V1.8 by adding out-of-sample, yearly, market-regime, rolling RankIC, and benchmark-relative validation while preserving compact Chinese outputs and research-only governance.

acceptance_checks.description: Run V1.8 on real AkShare public SW industry index data with compact outputs and enhanced validation.
Audit that V1.8 validation uses the compact output layout.
acceptance_checks.command: python .\scripts\audit_compact_output_layout.py --output-dir .\outputs\industry_index_research_validation --required-debug-files all_ranked_industries.csv raw_industry_panel.csv agent_results.json historical_feature_panel.csv rankic_report.csv group_return_report.csv topn_backtest.csv validation_decisions.csv yearly_validation_report.csv regime_validation_report.csv rolling_rankic_report.csv oos_validation_report.csv current_research_basket.csv research_basket_summary.csv real_data_audit.json

acceptance_checks.description: Audit the industry index factor registry after V1.8 validation enhancement.
Audit task brief governance after V1.8 migration.

decision_boundary: V1.8 remains research-only. Current PE/PB/dividend yield can explain the current cross-section but cannot be used for historical PIT validation until enough archived valuation snapshots exist. Historical validation uses PIT price-derived industry index features, market-regime context, and future labels only.
research_boundary: Research-only validation; no individual stocks, no trading signal, no order generation, no sample data, and no validated alpha promotion.
